verses.latin_vulgate: Exaudi, Deus, orationem meam,  et ne despexeris deprecationem meam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֲזִ֣ינָה אֱ֭לֹהִים תְּפִלָּתִ֑י וְאַל־תִּ֝תְעַלַּ֗ם מִתְּחִנָּתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear, O God, my prayer, and despise not my supplication:
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin opetus, edelläveisaajalle, kanteleilla. (H55:2) Jumala, kuule minun rukoukseni, ja älä peitä sinuas minun rukoukseni edestä.
verses.king_james: Give ear to my prayer, O God; and hide not thyself from my supplication.

verses.latin_vulgate: intende mihi, et exaudi me.  Contristatus sum in exercitatione mea,  et conturbatus sum
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַקְשִׁ֣יבָה לִּ֣י וַעֲנֵ֑נִי אָרִ֖יד בְּשִׂיחִ֣י וְאָהִֽימָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be attentive to me and hear me. I am grieved in my exercise; and am troubled,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ota minusta vaari ja kuule minua; että minä surkeasti valitan rukouksissani ja parun;
verses.king_james: Attend unto me, and hear me: I mourn in my complaint, and make a noise;

verses.latin_vulgate: a voce inimici, et a tribulatione peccatoris.  Quoniam declinaverunt in me iniquitates,  et in ira molesti erant mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִקּ֤וֹל אוֹיֵ֗ב מִ֭פְּנֵי עָקַ֣ת רָשָׁ֑ע כִּֽי־יָמִ֥יטוּ עָלַ֥י אָ֝֗וֶן וּבְאַ֥ף יִשְׂטְמֽוּנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: At the voice of the enemy, and at the tribulation of the sinner. For they have cast iniquities upon me: and in wrath they were troublesome to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että vihamies niin huutaa, ja jumalatoin ahdistaa; sillä he kääntävät valheen minun päälleni, ja asettavat itsensä vihassansa minua vastaan.
verses.king_james: Because of the voice of the enemy, because of the oppression of the wicked: for they cast iniquity upon me, and in wrath they hate me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cor meum conturbatum est in me,  et formido mortis cecidit super me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִ֭בִּי יָחִ֣יל בְּקִרְבִּ֑י וְאֵימ֥וֹת מָ֝֗וֶת נָפְל֥וּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My heart is troubled within me: and the fear of death is fallen upon me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun sydämeni vapisee minussa, ja kuoleman pelko lankesi minun päälleni.
verses.king_james: My heart is sore pained within me: and the terrors of death are fallen upon me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timor et tremor venerunt super me,  et contexerunt me tenebræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְאָ֣ה וָ֭רַעַד יָ֣בֹא בִ֑י וַ֝תְּכַסֵּ֗נִי פַּלָּצֽוּת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Fear and trembling are come upon me: and darkness hath covered me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pelko ja vavistus tulivat minun päälleni, ja kauhistus peitti minun.
verses.king_james: Fearfulness and trembling are come upon me, and horror hath overwhelmed me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi : Quis dabit mihi pennas sicut columbæ,  et volabo, et requiescam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֗ר מִֽי־יִתֶּן־לִ֣י אֵ֭בֶר כַּיּוֹנָ֗ה אָע֥וּפָה וְאֶשְׁכֹּֽנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: Who will give me wings like a dove, and I will fly and be at rest?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä sanoin: jospa minulla olisi siivet niinkuin mettisellä, että minä lentäisin, ja (joskus) lepäisin!
verses.king_james: And I said, Oh that I had wings like a dove! for then would I fly away, and be at rest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce elongavi fugiens,  et mansi in solitudine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִ֭נֵּה אַרְחִ֣יק נְדֹ֑ד אָלִ֖ין בַּמִּדְבָּ֣ר סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lo, I have gone far off flying away; and I abode in the wilderness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, niin minä kauvas pakenisin, ja oleskelisin korvessa, Sela!
verses.king_james: Lo, then would I wander far off, and remain in the wilderness. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exspectabam eum qui salvum me fecit  a pusillanimitate spiritus, et tempestate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָחִ֣ישָׁה מִפְלָ֣ט לִ֑י מֵר֖וּחַ סֹעָ֣ה מִסָּֽעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: I waited for him that hath saved me from pusillanimity of spirit, and a storm.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä rientäisin, että minä pääsisin tuulen puuskasta ja tuulispäästä.
verses.king_james: I would hasten my escape from the windy storm and tempest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcipita, Domine ; divide linguas eorum :  quoniam vidi iniquitatem et contradictionem in civitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּלַּ֣ע אֲ֭דֹנָי פַּלַּ֣ג לְשׁוֹנָ֑ם כִּֽי־רָאִ֨יתִי חָמָ֖ס וְרִ֣יב בָּעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Cast down, O Lord, and divide their tongues; for I have seen iniquity and contradiction in the city.
verses.finnish_biblia: Turmele, Herra, ja sekoita heidän kielensä; sillä minä näin väkivallan ja riidan kaupungissa.
verses.king_james: Destroy, O Lord, and divide their tongues: for I have seen violence and strife in the city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Die ac nocte circumdabit eam super muros ejus iniquitas ;  et labor in medio ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹמָ֤ם וָלַ֗יְלָה יְסוֹבְבֻ֥הָ עַל־חוֹמֹתֶ֑יהָ וְאָ֖וֶן וְעָמָ֣ל בְּקִרְבָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Day and night shall iniquity surround it upon its walls: and in the midst thereof are labour,
verses.finnish_biblia: He käyvät sen ympäri päivällä ja yöllä hänen muurinsa päällä: vääryys ja vaiva on sen keskellä.
verses.king_james: Day and night they go about it upon the walls thereof: mischief also and sorrow are in the midst of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: et injustitia :  et non defecit de plateis ejus usura et dolus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַוּ֥וֹת בְּקִרְבָּ֑הּ וְֽלֹא־יָמִ֥ישׁ מֵ֝רְחֹבָ֗הּ תֹּ֣ךְ וּמִרְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And injustice. And usury and deceit have not departed from its streets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vääryys on sen keskellä: valhe ja petos ei luovu hänen kaduiltansa.
verses.king_james: Wickedness is in the midst thereof: deceit and guile depart not from her streets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam si inimicus meus maledixisset mihi,  sustinuissem utique.  Et si is qui oderat me super me magna locutus fuisset,  abscondissem me forsitan ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י לֹֽא־אוֹיֵ֥ב יְחָֽרְפֵ֗נִי וְאֶ֫שָּׂ֥א לֹא־מְ֭שַׂנְאִי עָלַ֣י הִגְדִּ֑יל וְאֶסָּתֵ֥ר מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For if my enemy had reviled me, I would verily have borne with it. And if he that hated me had spoken great things against me, I would perhaps have hidden my self from him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä jos minun vihamieheni häpäisis minua, sen minä kärsisin: ja jos minun vainoojani nousis minua vastaan, niin minä kätkisin itseni hänen edestänsä.
verses.king_james: For it was not an enemy that reproached me; then I could have borne it: neither was it he that hated me that did magnify himself against me; then I would have hid myself from him:

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu vero homo unanimis,  dux meus, et notus meus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה אֱנ֣וֹשׁ כְּעֶרְכִּ֑י אַ֝לּוּפִ֗י וּמְיֻדָּעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But thou a man of one mind, my guide, and my familiar,
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan sinä olet minun kumppanini, minun johdattajani ja minun tuttavani:
verses.king_james: But it was thou, a man mine equal, my guide, and mine acquaintance.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui simul mecum dulces capiebas cibos ;  in domo Dei ambulavimus cum consensu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר יַ֭חְדָּו נַמְתִּ֣יק ס֑וֹד בְּבֵ֥ית אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים נְהַלֵּ֥ךְ בְּרָֽגֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who didst take sweetmeats together with me: in the house of God we walked with consent.
verses.finnish_biblia: Me jotka ystävällisesti keskenämme neuvoa pidimme, ja vaelsimme Jumalan huoneesen joukossa.
verses.king_james: We took sweet counsel together, and walked unto the house of God in company.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veniat mors super illos,  et descendant in infernum viventes :  quoniam nequitiæ in habitaculis eorum, in medio eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ישימות) [יַשִּׁ֤י מָ֨וֶת ׀] עָלֵ֗ימוֹ יֵרְד֣וּ שְׁא֣וֹל חַיִּ֑ים כִּֽי־רָע֖וֹת בִּמְגוּרָ֣ם בְּקִרְבָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let death come upon them, and let them go down alive into hell. For there is wickedness in their dwellings: in the midst of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Langetkoon kuolema heidän päällensä, ja he menkään elävänä alas helvettiin; sillä sula pahuus on heidän asuinsioissansa heidän keskellänsä.
verses.king_james: Let death seize upon them, and let them go down quick into hell: for wickedness is in their dwellings, and among them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem ad Deum clamavi,  et Dominus salvabit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲ֭נִי אֶל־אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֶקְרָ֑א וַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה יוֹשִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I have cried to God: and the Lord will save me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä huudan Jumalan tykö; ja Herra auttaa minua.
verses.king_james: As for me, I will call upon God; and the Lord shall save me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vespere, et mane, et meridie, narrabo, et annuntiabo ;  et exaudiet vocem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֶ֤רֶב וָבֹ֣קֶר וְ֭צׇהֳרַיִם אָשִׂ֣יחָה וְאֶהֱמֶ֑ה וַיִּשְׁמַ֥ע קוֹלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Evening and morning, and at noon I will speak and declare: and he shall hear my voice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ehtoona, aamulla ja puolipäivänä minä valitan ja itken; ja hän kuulee minun ääneni.
verses.king_james: Evening, and morning, and at noon, will I pray, and cry aloud: and he shall hear my voice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Redimet in pace animam meam ab his qui appropinquant mihi :  quoniam inter multos erant mecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פָּ֘דָ֤ה בְשָׁל֣וֹם נַ֭פְשִׁי מִקְּרׇב־לִ֑י כִּֽי־בְ֝רַבִּ֗ים הָי֥וּ עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall redeem my soul in peace from them that draw near to me: for among many they were with me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lunastaa minun sieluni niistä, jotka sotivat minua vastaan, ja saattaa hänelle rauhan; sillä monta on minua vastaan.
verses.king_james: He hath delivered my soul in peace from the battle that was against me: for there were many with me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaudiet Deus, et humiliabit illos,  qui est ante sæcula.  Non enim est illis commutatio,  et non timuerunt Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁמַ֤ע ׀ אֵ֨ל ׀ וְֽיַעֲנֵם֮ וְיֹ֤שֵׁ֥ב קֶ֗דֶם סֶ֥֫לָה אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֵ֣ין חֲלִיפ֣וֹת לָ֑מוֹ וְלֹ֖א יָרְא֣וּ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: God shall hear, and the Eternal shall humble them. For there is no change with them, and they have not feared God:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala kuulkoon, ja heitä nöyryyttäköön, joka alusta ollut on, Sela! jotka ei paranna heitänsä, eikä pelkää Jumalaa.
verses.king_james: God shall hear, and afflict them, even he that abideth of old. Selah. Because they have no changes, therefore they fear not God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Extendit manum suam in retribuendo ;  contaminaverunt testamentum ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁלַ֣ח יָ֭דָיו בִּשְׁלֹמָ֗יו חִלֵּ֥ל בְּרִיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath stretched forth his hand to repay. They have defiled his covenant,
verses.finnish_biblia: He laskevat kätensä hänen rauhallistensa päälle, ja turmelevat hänen liittonsa.
verses.king_james: He hath put forth his hands against such as be at peace with him: he hath broken his covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: divisi sunt ab ira vultus ejus,  et appropinquavit cor illius.  Molliti sunt sermones ejus super oleum ;  et ipsi sunt jacula.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָלְק֤וּ ׀ מַחְמָאֹ֣ת פִּיו֮ וּֽקְרָב־לִ֫בּ֥וֹ רַכּ֖וּ דְבָרָ֥יו מִשֶּׁ֗מֶן וְהֵ֣מָּה פְתִחֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: They are divided by the wrath of his countenance, and his heart hath drawn near. His words are smoother than oil, and the same are darts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän suunsa on liukkaampi kuin voi, ja sota on heidän sydämessänsä: heidän sanansa ovat sileämmät kuin öljy, ja ne ovat paljaat miekat.
verses.king_james: The words of his mouth were smoother than butter, but war was in his heart: his words were softer than oil, yet were they drawn swords.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jacta super Dominum curam tuam, et ipse te enutriet ;  non dabit in æternum fluctuationem justo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְׁלֵ֤ךְ עַל־יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ יְהָבְךָ֮ וְה֢וּא יְכַ֫לְכְּלֶ֥ךָ לֹא־יִתֵּ֖ן לְעוֹלָ֥ם מ֗וֹט לַצַּדִּֽיק׃
verses.douay_rheims: Cast thy care upon the Lord, and he shall sustain thee: he shall not suffer the just to waver for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heitä surus Herran päälle, hän sinusta murheen pitää, ja ei salli vanhurskaan olla kulkiana ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Cast thy burden upon the Lord, and he shall sustain thee: he shall never suffer the righteous to be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu vero, Deus, deduces eos in puteum interitus.  Viri sanguinum et dolosi non dimidiabunt dies suos ;  ego autem sperabo in te, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֤ה אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ תּוֹרִדֵ֬ם ׀ לִבְאֵ֬ר שַׁ֗חַת אַנְשֵׁ֤י דָמִ֣ים וּ֭מִרְמָה לֹא־יֶחֱצ֣וּ יְמֵיהֶ֑ם וַ֝אֲנִ֗י אֶבְטַח־בָּֽךְ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But thou, O God, shalt bring them down into the pit of destruction. Bloody and deceitful men shall not live out half their days; but I will trust in thee, O Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä, Jumala, syökset heitä syvään kuoppaan: murhamiehet ja pettäjät ei pidä tuleman puoli-ikäänsä; vaan minä toivon sinuun.
verses.king_james: But thou, O God, shalt bring them down into the pit of destruction: bloody and deceitful men shall not live out half their days; but I will trust in thee.
